ObjectPathRegex.description:
Object Path must start with /Game/ and end with AssetName.AssetName
Example: /Game/Others/InventoryItemIcon/Texture/T_itemicon_Armor_Head015.T_itemicon_Armor_Head015

ClassPathRegex.description:
Class Path must start with /Game/ and end with AssetName.AssetName_C
Example: /Game/Pal/Blueprint/Character/Monster/PalActorBP/Anubis/BP_Anubis.BP_Anubis_C
